meta.title: HSE Rail — Safety Management System Review
meta.subtitle: Depot D-2, SMS element assurance
meta.author: HSE Rail
meta.deid_notice: All personnel are referred to by role label. Identifiers were pseudonymised before drafting; the re-identification key is held separately and is not part of this document.

sections.text: This review assesses the rail safety management system (SMS) at depot D-2 element by element. The track-worker safe-system-of-work element carries an open high-risk gap on lookout-operated working.

sections.caption: SMS element assurance — element / source / status / owner

rows.title: Reliance on lookout-operated working
rows.description: Some possessions still rely on lookout working where a safer separated-from-traffic method is feasible.

rows.title: Tight roster turnaround margins
rows.description: Several rosters leave minimal recovery time between late and early turns.

rows.control: Plan possessions to separate workers from running lines
Train-warning / TCOD systems where separation is impractical

rows.action: Eliminate lookout-only working on the two affected possessions
Rebuild rosters to restore recovery margins

sections.text: No possession may proceed on lookout-only working where a safer separated method is reasonably practicable.
